llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced. Agenda was approved as posted.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: With that, we can move to the consent agenda, which we approve in one motion. Can I have a motion to approve the consent agenda? I move we approve the consent agenda. I second. Okay. All those in favor Aye.
